name: WePay (JPMorgan)
description: WePay (JPMorgan) — Integrated payments platform for SaaS and platforms backed by Chase, offering card processing and payouts via API.

seo.title: WePay (JPMorgan) — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: WePay (JPMorgan): WePay (JPMorgan) — Integrated payments platform for SaaS and platforms backed by Chase, offering card processing and payouts via API.

when_to_use: Embedding Chase-backed card processing into US SaaS platforms
Sub-merchant onboarding and payout via WePay PayFac API
ACH and card acceptance for software-embedded payments

cons: API feels dated vs modern peers
review.verdict: Bank-grade reliability for SaaS embedding payments, but DX is clearly a generation behind Stripe Connect.
review.best_for: US SaaS platforms wanting bank-backed embedded payments with Chase integration
review.not_for: Developer-first teams prioritizing modern API ergonomics and fast onboarding
